title: Gmail Alias Automation
excerpt: Does anyone know of an integration which would allow me to use my google alias instead of my account name? My work utilizes an alias and I utilize monday.com as my crm. I would ideally like to utilize the integration of …

posts.author: Samwashere (Sam Harrell)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know of an integration which would allow me to use my google alias instead of my account name? My work utilizes an alias and I utilize monday.com as my crm. I would ideally like to utilize the integration of “When incoming email is received from {blank} column set {date} to today”. However the alias or autoforward I use prevents that from happening. Any suggestions?

posts.author: nickarn (nick)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have the same problem we want to use Monday to track task and emails associated with them, you can only use gmail or outlook to send and receive emails using Monday.
a lot of companies have there own web hosting. so you have to use a gmail alias but Monday cant use the alias. It should set it to the default alias name of the gmail account not the actual gmail account name

posts.author: NoahM (Noah)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love the ability to send email from the aliases associated with my integrated gmail account.

posts.author: RobinD (Robin DuBroy)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to have this feature too. We use both the main email and an alias within gmail and many of our staff toggle between the two. Being able to choose between the two emails when we send emails through monday.com would be great.

posts.author: anj (Angela Corbett)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this? Would dearly love to send emails from an alias…
